artifacts.redacted_summary: Updated support guidance for access/pairing failures so responders explain that the issue is an authorization or pairing setup problem rather than a normal business error. For newly onboarded users, the recommended first step is to restart the affected service from the admin console; if that does not resolve the issue, escalate to an instance administrator for approval handling. Updated data-sensitivity guidance so responders do not infer authorization=[REDACTED] model naming patterns and instead direct users to official security or confidentiality channels for authoritative policy decisions.
